metadata.reference: K. K. Tikuišis, A. Dubroka, K. Uhlířová, F. Speck, T. Seyller, M. Losurdo, M. Orlita, M. Veis. Dielectric function of epitaxial quasi-freestanding monolayer graphene on Si-face 6H-SiC in a broad spectral range. Phys. Rev. Mater. 7, 044201 (2023)
metadata.comments: Epitaxial monolayer graphene grown on the Si face of 6H-SiC (0001). Room temperature.
